name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident f3356826-4f33-4772-bd03-1742644a5885
description:
Here’s an analysis of the security alert:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A critical C2 callback alert indicates a potential command and control (C2) interaction originating from a specific IP address.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – This technique describes a malicious actor attempting to execute a command on a compromised system.

3.  **ACTION:**  Immediately block the source IP address 192.168.1.25 to prevent further communication and potential lateral movement.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
